title: Environmental Nucleic Acid Extraction from Filter Samples Using MagAttract Kit
author: Shu-Kuan Wong
materials: For DNA samples: Proceed to the RNase digestion step. To remove RNA contamination, add 2 µL of RNase A (10 mg/mL, Fermentas) to 20 µL of DNA and incubate for 3–4 hours at 37 °C. After enzyme digestion, remove the RNase A using Macherey-Nagel's NucleoSpin gDNA Clean-up Kit, following the manufacturer's protocol. For RNA samples, proceed to the DNAse digestion step using TURBO DNA- free ‱ Kit (Invitrogen, AM1907) and cDNA library preparation steps using PrimeScript‱ II 1st strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (TaKaRa, 6210A) .

steps.title: Warm Solution MBL at 60°C for...
steps.instruction: Warm Solution MBL at 60°C for 15-20 minutes to dissolve precipitates. 60 °C 00:15:00

steps.title: To extract both DNA and RNA...
steps.instruction: To extract both DNA and RNA or only RNA, add 25μL of β-mercaptoethanol (β-ME) to 975 μL of Solution MBL. 25 µL

steps.title: Cut open the Sterivex cartridge with a tube cutter
steps.instruction: Cut open the Sterivex cartridge with a tube cutter. Using a surgical scalpel (Akiyama MEDICAL MFG, Replacement blade No. 15) and two sets of sterile forceps, grasp the filter membrane at opposite edges and transfer the filter into a 5 mL PowerWater DNA Bead Tube (provided) with the top side (sample side) facing inward.

steps.title: Expel the RNAlater from the Sterivex...
steps.instruction: Expel the RNAlater from the Sterivex cartridge using a 10 mL syringe (TERUMO, SS-10SZ).

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 mL of pre-warmed Solution MBL to each PowerWater DNA Bead Tube. 1.5 mL

steps.title: Place the PowerWater DNA Bead Tubes...
steps.instruction: Place the PowerWater DNA Bead Tubes into a Microsmash Beads Beater (TOMY, MS-100). Disrupt the sample at 3,800 rpm for 1 minute, rest for 30 seconds, and then repeat disruption again at 3,800 rpm for 1 minute. 3800 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute 00:00:30 3800 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute Microsmash Beads Beater (TOMY, MS-100, https://bio.tomys.co.jp/products/micro_homogenizing_system/ )

steps.title: Centrifuge the PowerWater DNA Bead Tubes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the PowerWater DNA Bead Tubes at 4500 x g for 1 minute at room temperature. 4500 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 5 mL tube (WATSON 233-150C). To recover as much supernantant as possible, insert the pipette tip through the beads to the bottom of the bead tube. Note: The supernatant may still contain some bio-solid particles.

steps.title: Add 200 μL of Solution IRS...
steps.instruction: Add 200 μL of Solution IRS to each tube and seal with Parafilm. 200 µL

steps.title: Vortex horizontally at 500 rpm for...
steps.instruction: Vortex horizontally at 500 rpm for 5 seconds to ensure that the solution is well mixed. 500 rpm, Room temperature, 5 seconds Digital VORTEX-GENIE 2 (Scientific Industries, Inc, SI-A236, https://www.scientificindustries.com/digital-vortex-genie-2.html )

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes. Room temperature 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge the 5 mL tubes at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the 5 mL tubes at 4500 x g for 6 minutes at room temperature . 4500 x g, Room temperature, 6 minutes

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire volume of supernatant to a new 5 mL tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge again at 4500x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge again at 4500x g for 6 minutes to remove any residual particulates that may have carried over. 4500 x g, Room temperature, 6 minutes

steps.title: Transfer all supernatant (~1 mL) to...
steps.instruction: Transfer all supernatant (~1 mL) to a new 5 mL tube (WATSON 233-150C), carefully avoiding any residual pellet. <STOPPING POINT> If needed, store the supernatant in the 5ml tube at 4°C for several hours before continuing the protocol.

steps.title: Ensure ClearMag Beads are thoroughly resuspended...
steps.instruction: Ensure ClearMag Beads are thoroughly resuspended by shaking or rocking the bottle, and re-agitate the beads every 3 minutes.

steps.title: For each preparation, add 20 μL...
steps.instruction: For each preparation, add 20 μL of ClearMag Beads and 1 mL of ClearMag Binding Solution . Seal the tube with Parafilm. 1 mL 20 µL

steps.title: Mix the beads and the lysate...
steps.instruction: Mix the beads and the lysate by placing the tube horizontally on a vortex at the lowest setting (VORTEX-GENIE 2 = 500 rpm) for 20 minutes to allow DNA binding. 500 rpm, Room temperature, 20 minutes Digital VORTEX-GENIE 2 (Scientific Industries, Inc, SI-A236, https://www.scientificindustries.com/digital-vortex-genie-2.html )

steps.title: Place the tube on a magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a magnetic stand and allow about 3 minutes for the beads to completely adhere to the magnet. 00:03:00 DynaMag™-5 Magnet (Invitrogen™, 12303D, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12303D?SID=srch-srp-12303D )

steps.title: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant without disturbing the beads
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant without disturbing the beads.

steps.title: Add 500 μL of ClearMag Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of ClearMag Wash Solution and remove the tube from the magnetic stand. 500 µL

steps.title: Resuspend the beads thoroughly by pipetting...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads thoroughly by pipetting up and down for 10 times or by vortexing at the lowest speed for 10 sec, until all beads are fully resuspended.

steps.title: Place the tube on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on the magnetic stand and allow 3 minutes for the beads to adhere to the magnet. Carefully remove the supernantant. 00:03:00 DynaMag™-5 Magnet (Invitrogen™, 12303D, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12303D?SID=srch-srp-12303D )

steps.title: Repeat steps 21 - 23 two...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 21 - 23 two more times (for a total of 3 washes) using 500 μl of ClearMag Wash Solution each time. 500 µL 00:03:00

steps.title: Using a 200 μL pipette tip,...
steps.instruction: Using a 200 μL pipette tip, carefully remove any remaining wash from the tube, taking care not to disturb the beads.

steps.title: Resuspend the beads in 100 μL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads in 100 μL (both RNA and DNA) or 50 μl (RNA or DNA only) of Clear-Mag RNAse-free water to elute the nucleic acid. 100 µL

steps.title: To ensure all wash solution is...
steps.instruction: To ensure all wash solution is removed, leave the tubes open in a biosafety hood for 5 minutes, place them on the magnetic stand to remove any remaining liquid, and dry again for 5 mins or until the beads are visibly dry. 00:20:00

steps.title: To elute the nucleic acid, heat...
steps.instruction: To elute the nucleic acid, heat at 65°C for 5 minutes, flicking the tube occasionally to mix. 65 °C 00:05:00

steps.title: Place the tube on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on the magnetic stand and allow 3 minutes for the beads to adhere to the magnet. 00:03:00 DynaMag™-5 Magnet (Invitrogen™, 12303D, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12303D?SID=srch-srp-12303D )

steps.title: Keep the tube on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Keep the tube on the magnetic stand and carefully open the lid, then transfer the eluate to a new 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: The purified nucleic acids can be used immediately
steps.instruction: The purified nucleic acids can be used immediately. Alternatively, store the DNA and RNA at -80°C for long-term preservation.
